fields.scope: 10-year NEM reliability outlook. Published annually by AEMO around August/September. WA SWIS has a separate ESOO under AEMO WA.
fields.primary_source_document: AEMO ESOO PDF and supporting workbook (Excel) released annually.
fields.keying_plan: Key the headline reliability standard, scheduled retirements (Eraring, Yallourn, Bayswater dates), committed new capacity, and any forecast unserved-energy breach years. Cite report year and table number.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed ESOO headline figures: scheduled retirements, committed new builds, reliability outlook. Update annually when AEMO releases the new ESOO.
